examples: Apex of ocrea usually with green leaflike wing; leaf blade 5-12 cm wide.
Any of several green algae of the genus Ulva, having a membranous leaflike, irregularly shaped thallus sometimes used in salads.
Sargassums are also known as sea holly because of their highly Branched stems with hollow, Berrylike floats and many leaflike, sawtooth-edged Blades.
Calligraphy and the arabesque a continuous leaflike design dominate Islamic art, yet there are many figurative works here as well.
